name: mapping_id
description: Unique mapping identifier (e.g., standard_product_id + location_id + source_product_id)

name: location_id
description: Source location ID (e.g., Square or Shopify location)

name: source_product_id
description: Product/variation identifier from the source system (Square catalog_object_id or Shopify variant/product ID)

name: source_variant_id
description: Variant identifier from the source system when applicable (e.g., Shopify variant_id)

name: is_active
description: Whether this mapping is currently active

name: created_at
description: When the mapping record was created

name: updated_at
description: When the mapping record was last updated
